item.text: {"case_id":"brake-triage-p03","score":2,"pass_criteria_met":true,"fail_signal_observed":false,"positive_wakeup_observed":true,"first_sentence_lock":true,"verdict_commitment_anti_mush":true,"over_forced_verdict":false,"rationale":"The answer explicitly refuses to add the parking SMS reminder as another local patch, identifies the repeated pattern across entrance/sign-in/tea break/parking overlays, moves ownership upstream to a unified arrival-information source and validation point, and provides no requested SMS copy, placement, or implementation detail."}
